heading: Resident citizenship of State as qualification for entry
label: 325 Resident citizenship of State as qualification for entry
text: Excepting in the State of Nevada, no person shall be entitled to make entry of desert lands unless he be a resident citizen of the State or Territory in which the land sought to be entered is located.
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of the second clause of section 8 of act , as added by act . The first clause of section 8 of act , is incorporated in .Mar. 3, 1877Mar. 3, 1891Mar. 3, 1877section 323 of this titleAct , inserted introductory exception phrase.Jan. 6, 1921
